pi_items.source: Task description in task.json explicitly instructs the agent to use this name.
Task description and setup_task.sh, which starts an HTTP server on port 8080 serving industry_news.xml.
XML content generated directly within setup_task.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an RSS feed account named 'Market Intelligence' and subscribing to a synthetic feed hosted at 'http://localhost:8080/industry_news.xml'. The feed is generated locally by setup_task.sh and includes the article 'Globex Corp Announces Q3 Results'. All metadata claims align perfectly with the task description and setup script.
